temporal_deltas.summary: The sequence begins with empty pots and concludes with a complete failure of the visual monitoring system.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the pots. The system is in a state of total biological collapse.
vision_report.anomalies: The final three images (T-2, T-1, CURRENT) are completely black, indicating a sensor failure or total lack of illumination.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic failure of the botanical biome. From the earliest image, the pots are devoid of the expected specimens (P1-P4). The 'White Rabbit' anchor is the only consistent element until the camera feed fails entirely at T-2. The lack of plant matter suggests either a previous total loss or a failure to establish the biome. The final frames suggest a hardware or environmental lighting failure.
